parsed_verdict.reasoning: On re-examination, Stage 2 Rule 5 contains the explicit cross-reference '(from Rule 2)', which satisfies N12's requirement for at least one cross-rule reference. Rule count is 7, well within N9 thresholds. The rules are independent (each covers a distinct phenomenon: vertical tendencies, fall speed, layering, horizontal effort, persistence, wind susceptibility, celestial motion) and each traces to specific observations within permitted Aristotelian elaborations (impressed-motion with explicit fading for the arrow, medium-resistance for falling bodies, natural-place language, heaven/earth split). Correcting my initial judgment: all four criteria pass.
